summary: Tested 5 targeted frontend bug fixes on /mira-os and /admin pages. All 5 fixes confirmed working via code review and UI testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking 'Mira' logo via Playwright force=True doesn't navigate to /pet-home due to a fixed inset-0 overlay (backdrop modal z-[9998]) covering the header at page load. JS click DOES work correctly. This is a pre-existing issue with the onboarding dialog overlay.

bug_fix_1_picks_vault_why_reason.details: Code at PicksVault.jsx line 275-277 correctly maps: (product.why_for_pet || product.why_reason || product.why_it_fits || product.reason). PICKS tab (PersonalizedPicksPanel) shows subtitle/reason text under product names (e.g., 'Fun design for playful celebrations'). PicksVault component (chat-flow) confirmed correct in code but not triggered in UI test (requires AI to return inline picks).

bug_fix_2_concierge_textarea.details: ConciergePanel.jsx textarea is now always visible (not conditional on hasLearnContext). Code confirmed. CONCIERGE tab shows textarea (data-testid='concierge-input', placeholder='What can we help with today?') from ConciergeHomePanel. Legacy ConciergePanel shows 'Anything else? Tell us how we can help Mojo:' label when not in learn context.

bug_fix_3_mira_logo_back.details: data-testid='mira-logo-home-btn' found with onClick handler and cursor:pointer. JS click navigates to /pet-home successfully. Playwright force click blocked by fixed backdrop overlay (z-[9998]) which is a pre-existing onboarding dialog issue, not a bug in this fix.

bug_fix_4_pet_name_not_buddy.details: MiraDemoPage.jsx line 2967 uses 'pet?.name || my dog' instead of hardcoded 'Buddy'. No 'Buddy' references found in any quick reply chips during birthday party conversation flow. Quick replies found: 'Cozy celebration', 'Invite dog friends', 'Show me party supplies'.

bug_fix_5_admin_services_manager.details: ServicesManager.jsx now fetches /api/service-box/services?limit=500 (no pillar=services filter). Admin shows '500 of 500 services · all pillars · services_master' with full table of services. NOT stuck on 'Loading services...'. Has 'All pillars' dropdown filter working. 25 service rows visible in table.

action_items: LOW: The fixed backdrop overlay (z-[9998]) that appears when /mira-os loads (from NewChatConfirmDialog/OnboardingTooltip) blocks clicks on the Mira logo. This is a pre-existing UX issue mentioned in iteration_245. The fix itself (onClick handler) works correctly via JS click.

OBSERVATION: PicksVault (inline chat picks vault with .pv-pick-why CSS class) was not triggered during testing — requires AI to generate inline product picks during chat. Confirmed code fix is in place.
critical_code_review_comments: MiraDemoPage.jsx is 5511 lines — well over the 700-line guideline. Major refactor needed. Already noted in iteration_245.

The fixed backdrop overlay (bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm z-[9998]) from the onboarding dialog appears at page load and blocks all header elements. Should be dismissed more gracefully or shown on a delay.
seed_data_creation: None — no new data created. Birthday chat messages sent to Mira for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 bug fixes in this iteration verified working. Key info: (1) /mira-os has a fixed onboarding overlay at page load (NewChatConfirmDialog) that blocks header clicks - use JS clicks or force click to bypass. (2) Admin /admin uses form-based login (aditya/lola4304), not HTTP Basic Auth. (3) ServicesManager is under 12 PILLARS → Services in admin nav. (4) PICKS tab uses PersonalizedPicksPanel (not PicksVault directly). PicksVault is for inline chat picks. (5) Mira AI chat responds with personalized answers for Mojo.

rca_of_bugs_fixed.bug_1_picks_vault: PicksVault.jsx previously only checked one field name for the 'why' reason text. Fix maps 4 field names: why_for_pet, why_reason, why_it_fits, reason.
rca_of_bugs_fixed.bug_2_concierge_textarea: ConciergePanel.jsx textarea was conditionally wrapped in {hasLearnContext && ...}. Fix removes the condition so textarea is always visible.
rca_of_bugs_fixed.bug_3_mira_logo: MiraUnifiedHeader.jsx mira-logo-section div had no onClick handler. Fix adds onClick={() => { hapticFeedback.buttonTap(); navigate('/pet-home'); }}.
rca_of_bugs_fixed.bug_4_hardcoded_buddy: MiraDemoPage.jsx line 2967 had hardcoded 'Buddy' in quick reply chip text. Fix uses template literal with pet?.name.
rca_of_bugs_fixed.bug_5_admin_loading: ServicesManager.jsx was fetching /api/service-box/services?pillar=services which returns 0 results (no items have pillar='services'). Fix fetches without pillar filter and adds pillar dropdown for client-side filtering.
